title: ✨ The Smart Time-Travel Update!
message: Never lose your reading progress again! Experience our ultimate modern viewport memory tracking systems.
points: ⏱️ Reading Location Saved: Automatically locks your anchor spot if you stay still for 4+ seconds.
↩️ One-Tap Smart Jump: Accidentally scrolled away? Snap straight back to your progress with our minimal bottom option bar.
🔒 Sealed Monetization Logic: Premium features work safely offline with secure ad-gate validation frames.
🐛 Zero-Crash Engine: Fully squashed background layout race-condition thread blocks for a flawless viewer experience.

title: ⚡ The Ultimate Power Tools Update!
message: We've completely supercharged your reading experience! Access a full suite of professional PDF tools directly from the viewer.
points: 🛠️ In-Viewer Power Tools: Compress, Merge, Split, and Extract pages without ever leaving your document.
🔔 Smart Update Hub: Stay in the loop! Get notified instantly when we drop exciting new features.
🖼️ Image & PDF Converters: Seamlessly convert PDFs to photos and vice versa, 100% offline.
✨ Performance Polish: Smoother scrolling, faster rendering, and completely squashed bugs.
